title: 2025-2026 Academic Year Double Major (ÇAP) / Minor Application Results
content:
2025-2026 Academic Year Double Major (ÇAP) / Minor Application Results

Dear Students,

The results of the 2025-2026 academic year Double Major (ÇAP) / Minor applications have been announced. You can check your application status by entering your Turkish ID number. Registrations will take place at the Student Affairs Office between

7-13 October.

DOUBLE MAJOR:

https://app.uskudar.edu.tr/form/ogrenci/cap_sonuc

MINOR:

https://app.uskudar.edu.tr/form/ogrenci/yandal_sonuc
